text:
This article is about the Evangelion from Neon Genesis Evangelion: Battle Orchestra video game. For the Evangelion from the Stage Evangelion Beyond, see Evangelion α.

 is an original Evangelion unit featured in the Neon Genesis Evangelion: Battle Orchestra game. It is piloted by a Dummy Plug based on Rei Ayanami. The unit was produced and scrapped in secrecy by SEELE.

Profile

It is the sister unit of the Evangelion Unit-β. Unit Alpha is a green-coloured Evangelion that was developed in secrecy by SEELE but eventually was scapped. 乙号機の兄弟機という以外は一切不明。
接近戦を得意とする乙とは対極的に、特殊なビーム兵器を搭載した遠距離キャラクター。特殊条件をクリアした時、使用可能となるらしい。 

It can use physical moves but it is weaker and slower than the sister Evangelion Unit-β.

Weapons

Beam emitters
It attacks with six distance-controlled beam emitters mounted on its shoulder pylons that can move in various directions, attacking the enemy in a barrage of beam attacks. These weapons can attach and reform in various patterns, one attack unifies all 6 barrels and releases a powerful beam at the enemy.

Moveset

Trivia

It appears when you reach the 41th opponent in the Endless mode.
It is also called EVA-甲 in the menu.
